title: Windows MSBuild Execution for Code Bypass
description: Detects execution of MSBuild.exe which can compile and execute inline C# code from XML project files, bypassing application whitelisting and AppLocker policies.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*MSBuild.exe'))
